text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one of our days off, we're volunteering at a
baking class for children when Eishin Flash and I
notice one of the kids standing alone in the
corner.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? You have yet to touch your
ingredients. Are you having difficulties with
something?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Twelve minutes, thirty-one seconds have elapsed
since the class began. We are more than happy to
help if needed, so why don't you give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Quiet Child
text_block_list.text: Don't wanna... Too many people...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The child looks interested in the class but is
hesitant to join the others. I try to make it less
daunting.
choice_data_list: No rush. You can start whenever you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The child nods with relief. I'm sure things will be
fine, but I still want to keep an eye on them.
choice_data_list:
Let's save some cookies for them once we're
done.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Sure. Good idea.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The cookies are done. You all did very well. Let's
get ready for Teezeit with some tea and enjoy the
cookies while they're hot.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: They look so yummy!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Child
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! Mine are the best, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Lively Child
text_block_list.text:
The ones I made are so good! Look how neat I
made them!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe. They look wonderfully happy. ...Oh, yes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The cookies are ready. I baked these... Would
you like to share some with me?

text_block_list.name: Quiet Child
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, of cour—

text_block_list.name: Energetic Child
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's not fair! How come they get to eat
cookies even though they didn't help at all?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the accusation, the quiet child freezes before
retracting the hand that was reaching out for the
cookies Eishin Flash holds in her hands. That's
when Eishin Flash speaks.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Did everyone have fun baking cookies today?

text_block_list.name: Children Who Participated
text_block_list.text: Yeah, lots!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Child
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! We did lotsa mixing and made lotsa
cookies shaped like cars and kitties!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad. But did you know that it's just as nice
when you see someone else enjoying your
baking?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
How about this? If I give you one of the cookies I
made, would you be willing to share one of yours
with our friend here?

text_block_list.name: Energetic Child
text_block_list.text:
You'll give me one of your cookies?! Hmm...
Okay. Here, you can have this.

text_block_list.name: Quiet Child
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expected Eishin Flash to take a harsher
approach, so I'm surprised by how gently she
handled things. When I ask her about it...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I understand what they are feeling. Attempting a
new endeavor comes with nervousness and
confusion. We hyperfixate on the task at hand
and then boast about our accomplishment after.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, these feelings are not inherently bad.
Hesitation allows the mind to prepare. Fixation is
the driver of hard work. Though they can appear
negative, emotions can be fuel for growth.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That is what my mother taught me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm glad that you agree.

text_block_list.name: Quiet Child
text_block_list.text: This is really good! You're so good at baking!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Child
text_block_list.text:
...Right?! Aren't my cookies the best? I got more
over there, so c'mon!

text_block_list.name: Quiet Child
text_block_list.text: Okay!
choice_data_list: They both look so happy now.
They both look so happy now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Baked treats have the power to make
people smile.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Baking allows all people to share in their joy
together. That's why I love baking so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash smiles softly as she watches the kids
wolf down cookies.
